mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, gpa_score, language_score, publication_score, research_score, internship_score, exchange_score, competition_score, undergraduate_school_score, overall_academic_score, score_version, score_detail_json FROM student_background_score WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_background_score( user_id, gpa_score, language_score, publication_score, research_score, internship_score, exchange_score, competition_score, undergraduate_school_score, overall_academic_score, score_version, score_detail_json ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{gpaScore}, #{languageScore}, #{publicationScore}, #{researchScore}, #{internshipScore}, #{exchangeScore}, #{competitionScore}, #{undergraduateSchoolScore}, #{overallAcademicScore}, #{scoreVersion}, #{scoreDetailJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE gpa_score = VALUES(gpa_score), language_score = VALUES(language_score), publication_score = VALUES(publication_score), research_score = VALUES(research_score), internship_score = VALUES(internship_score), exchange_score = VALUES(exchange_score), competition_score = VALUES(competition_score), undergraduate_school_score = VALUES(undergraduate_school_score), overall_academic_score = VALUES(overall_academic_score), score_version = VALUES(score_version), score_detail_json = VALUES(score_detail_json)
